returns.remainingSeconds: Seconds remaining until recovery can complete

returns.allowed: True if the action is allowed

evaluateState(uint256).notice: Evaluate the circuit state based on resonance score

getCircuitState(uint256).notice: Get the circuit state for an avatar

getRecoveryCooldown(uint256).notice: Get the cooldown remaining for an avatar's recovery

isActionAllowed(uint8,uint8).notice: Check if an action is allowed given a circuit state

triggerRecovery(uint256).notice: Trigger recovery for an avatar in HARD_PAUSE or SOFT_LIMIT
